name: Seazen Group Limited
summary: Seazen Group Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the investment, development, and sale of properties in the People's Republic of China. The company operates through two segments, A Share Company and Non-A Share Companies. It primarily develops and sells residential properties and mixed-use complexes, as well as provides commercial property management and other services. As of December 31, 2020, the company had total land bank of approximately 142,876,372 square meters. It also provides asset operation and management, marketing research, consulting, department store management, apartment leasing, information technology, and children entertainment, as well as hotel, and conference, and cinema management services. In addition, the company offers securities and future brokerage, book running, placing management, and money lending services, as well as dealing and advising services of securities. Further, it provides architecture designing service; and is involved in the maintenance and leasing energy equipment, as well as designs, manufactures, and sells auto parts. The company was formerly known as Future Land Development Holdings Limited and changed its name to Seazen Group Limited in November 2019. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China. Seazen Group Limited is a subsidiary of Wealth Zone Hong Kong Investments Limited.
